02 — About Me

Who I Am

I'm Nobojit Majumder, a 20-year-old Diploma Engineering student at Mangrove Institute of Science and Technology, currently in my 6th semester of Computer Science & Technology — graduating 2026.

My passion lies in Cyber Security & Ethical Hacking. I'm enrolled in a professional certification at Bangladesh Computer Council while building expertise in Digital Marketing, YouTube SEO, and Content Creation.

Outside tech: coding, gaming, and tech blogging. I thrive in environments that push me to grow every day.
